flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Dartmouth College rose 40% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.5k → $17.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Dartmouth College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (85.7% → 74.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Dartmouth College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.9k → $68.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Dartmouth College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.9k → $68.3k).
